title: Healthcare Readmission Risk
summary: Estimate readmission risk and expose operational levers for care coordination teams.
knowledge_base: Healthcare Readmission Risk is positioned as a HealthTech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Estimate readmission risk and expose operational levers for care coordination teams.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on healthcare, risk, patients.

app_modules.description: Simulate how incoming events are scored before they hit an operator queue.
app_modules.hint: Risk band and top signals will appear here.
